title: Bad code gives error on conditional logic inside output port of nested generate

features.name: conditional operator in output port within generate for
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation inside a generate for loop where an output port connection uses a conditional (ternary) operator

features.name: nested generate for with genvar in conditional output port
features.description: Code should include nested generate for loops with genvar indices used in conditional expressions within module output port connections
